body_transformation: Chansey's plump body now features smooth, scale-like textures in deep ocean blue with subtle teal undertones, replacing its pale cream skin. The pointed rabbit ears have transformed into delicate, translucent fins with inner aquamarine glows, maintaining their original shape. Its curled spiral tail tip now extends into a streamlined fin with pearly white edges and seafoam green highlights. Webbed limbs replace the stubby legs, with each toe separated by thin, flexible membranes.
signature_feature: Tail fin: seamless pearly white membrane with seafoam green edge and subtle aquamarine glow.
